## Review Checklist

- [ ] Linked issue requirements are satisfied
- [ ] Acceptance criteria are covered
- [ ] Tests or manual checks are documented
- [ ] No unrelated refactors or formatting churn
- [ ] Configuration, secrets, and deployment paths are handled safely
- [ ] Logs and error messages do not expose secrets
- [ ] Documentation is updated when behavior or operations changed
